title: Luffy Chooses to Smash the Ark
description: On pages 7–10, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8. The central beat is luffy chooses to smash the ark.
scene: The scene focuses on luffy chooses to smash the ark, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 shaping the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I suspected he might do this...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Oh, man!!! The air's all gone!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What kind of monster are you?!!!

summary: Luffy Chooses to Smash the Ark. This part advances the end of the Fish-Man Island conflict and the island’s attempt to move beyond inherited hatred.
